heading: Semantic Boosting
body:
This section demonstrates how to query the data in the
`sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection for *star wars* in the
`plot_embedding_voyage_3_large` and `plot` fields by using the
[$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) and [$search](pipe.$search) pipeline stages,
respectively. The query enhances relevancy of [$search](pipe.$search)
queries  by boosting the full-text scores using
[$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) scores for the same documents.
